checks.observed: Review listed all last-session wrong answers with question, wrong pick, and correct answer labels.
Scope toggle showed aria-current on active option; all-time view was superset of last-session list.
Empty state before setup quiz showed localized copy and all-time scope link.
Retry page had data-quiz-mode=retry and data-total=234 matching last-session mistakes.
Retry submitted answers via /api/quiz; no /api/progress POST; no quiz-resume localStorage keys.
Safety topic remained 305/305 after retry; retry did not alter saved progress.
Vehicle /retry redirected to /review when no last-session mistakes.
Zero error-level console entries across the flow.
Scope group labeled; aria-current on active scope; textual wrong/correct labels in review rows.
Review/Retry Hebrew copy rendered without raw keys or direction breakage.

not_tested: Exploration budget (reload mid-retry, browser back, deep-link, retry twice)
limitations: Setup quiz completed all 305 safety questions (not a short 5-question session) due to session recording requirements.
Dashboard before-retry screenshot taken after setup quiz; retry comparison uses unchanged 305/305 state.
